ksa_text: Knowledge of enterprise board-level risk reporting and integration of data risk, AI risk, and technology risk into executive risk dashboards and board governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the knowledge contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('board.level'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4188); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
